mapper.sql: id, tier, duration_months, base_month_price_cent, discount_rate, enabled, sort_order, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM membership_pricing_config WHERE tier = #{tier,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND enabled = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM membership_pricing_config ORDER BY tier ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO membership_pricing_config ( tier, duration_months, base_month_price_cent, discount_rate, enabled, sort_order, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{tier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{durationMonths,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{baseMonthPriceCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{discountRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enabled,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE membership_pricing_config SET tier = #{tier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration_months = #{durationMonths,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, base_month_price_cent = #{baseMonthPriceCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, discount_rate = #{discountRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
